### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Projections](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Projections.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Projections')

## IProjectionChangeNotifier Interface

Notifies the EventStore that a projection's read model has changed,
triggering ETag regeneration for cache invalidation\.

```csharp
public interface IProjectionChangeNotifier
```

### Remarks
Client package defines the interface with zero infrastructure dependencies\.
Server package provides the DAPR implementation \(`DaprProjectionChangeNotifier`\)\.
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Projections.IProjectionChangeNotifier.NotifyProjectionChangedAsync(string,string,string,System.Threading.CancellationToken)'></a>

## IProjectionChangeNotifier\.NotifyProjectionChangedAsync\(string, string, string, CancellationToken\) Method

Notifies that a projection has changed for a given tenant\.

```csharp
System.Threading.Tasks.Task NotifyProjectionChangedAsync(string projectionType, string tenantId, string? entityId=null, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken=default(System.Threading.CancellationToken));
```
